Usage:
  circleci mcp cursor [command]

Available Commands:
  disable     Remove server from Cursor config
  enable      Add server to Cursor config
  list        Show Cursor MCP servers

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci mcp cursor [command] --help" for more information about a command.
